recommendations.title: Bring It On: Cheer Or Die
recommendations.overview: When a cheer squad practices their routines on Halloween weekend in an abandoned school, they are picked off one by one by an unknown killer.

recommendations.title: The Last Prosecco
recommendations.overview: The suicide of a prominent wine producer unleashes a series of mysterious murders.

recommendations.title: Night Tide
recommendations.overview: A young sailor falls in love with a mysterious woman performing as a mermaid on the local pier. As they become entwined, he comes to suspect the woman might be a real mermaid who lures men to a watery death during the full moon.  Preserved by the Aca

recommendations.title: The Souvenir
recommendations.overview: A shy but ambitious film student falls into an intense, emotionally fraught relationship with a charismatic but untrustworthy older man.

recommendations.title: The Last Matinee
recommendations.overview: In 1993, spectators at the last screening of a horror film at a downtown cinema fall one by one into the hands of a sadistic and ruthless killer.

recommendations.title: Prom Night
recommendations.overview: At a high school senior prom, a masked killer stalks four teenagers who were responsible for the accidental death of a classmate six years prior.

recommendations.title: Tamara
recommendations.overview: Tamara, an unattractive girl who is picked on by her peers, returns after her death as a sexy seductress to enact revenge.

recommendations.title: They/Them
recommendations.overview: Campers at an LGBTQ+ conversion camp endure unsettling psychological techniques while the campsite is stalked by a mysterious killer.

recommendations.title: Let Her Kill You

recommendations.title: The Adversary
